archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast mixed with The 'Technical' Look (Linear.app / Vercel / Stripe inspired)

headings.instruction: CRITICAL: Do NOT use Inter for headings. Use Cabinet Grotesk for a crisp, premium SaaS aesthetic. Apply tracking-tight to all headings > 32px.

body.instruction: Use Inter or SF Pro equivalent for high legibility in body paragraphs and dense data tables.

data_metrics.instruction: Use JetBrains Mono for all KPIs, AQI numbers, table data, and predictions to create a technical 'Data Science' feel.

colors.instruction: Follow Linear app style: Deep OLED blacks (#0A0A0A) for background. Soft whites (#F8FAFC) for light mode. Use primary blue sparingly for primary CTAs only. Success/Danger/Warning for AQI status.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use on sticky headers and floating navs: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 (dark) or bg-white/70 (light) with 1px delicate inner border.
visual_enhancers.grid_borders: For the analytics dashboard, expose the skeleton. Use border-collapse style with subtle borders (border-border/40) on right/bottom of grid items.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Deep ambient shadows in light mode. Minimal shadows but sharp 1px borders in dark mode.
visual_enhancers.vercel_grid: Add a subtle CSS grid background (linear-gradient lines with 10% opacity) in the Hero section.

components.cards: Minimalist, sharp or max 8px border-radius (rounded-md). Avoid heavy drop shadows in dark mode; rely on subtle 1px borders.
components.buttons: Pill-shaped or slightly rounded (rounded-md). Smooth hover states with translation and glow.
components.inputs: Shadcn UI standard, minimal borders, clear focus rings.
components.tables: Zebra striping on dense tables, right-aligned numbers, sticky headers.

grids_and_layouts.dashboard: High Density Grid (Bento style). Base: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6). Use col-span-2 for charts, col-span-1 for summary widgets.
grids_and_layouts.marketing: The 'Tetris' Grid for landing page features. Wide gaps (gap-8). Asymmetrical.

motion.hover: Subtle -translate-y-1 on cards, text color brightens.
motion.page_load: Staggered entrance animations for dashboard widgets using Framer Motion.
motion.charts: Smooth drawing animations for line charts.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA 4.5:1. Never use gray-on-gray for essential metrics.
accessibility.data_testids: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='upload-csv-button').

media_and_icons.icon_library: @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone weight for marketing, Regular for dashboard).

landing_hero.description: Clean modern city skyline reflecting clear air quality.

landing_feature_1.description: Contemporary skyscraper architecture against blue sky.

libraries.charts: recharts (for 2D standard charts) and Leaflet/react-leaflet (for AQI maps).

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react framer-motion recharts leaflet react-leaflet sonner react-hook-form zod
Update tailwind.config.js to include Cabinet Grotesk, Inter, and JetBrains Mono.
Implement a dark/light mode toggle in the header.
Build the dashboard using the 'Grid Borders' structural look (visible 1px borders between panels).
Ensure the AQI gauges use the defined semantic colors (Good=Success, Unhealthy=Danger).
For the Landing Page, use pure HTML/Tailwind with asymmetrical Bento Grids. Do not use generic Shadcn Cards for marketing sections.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Make creative, distinctive frontends.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for sticky headers.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). Add transitions for specific properties.
You MUST NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; }).
Always use modern button styles with interaction animations & context-relevant color.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters (🤖🧠💡) for icons. Use Phosphor Icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
DO NOT use completely transparent backgrounds under content (dropdowns, navs).
